svg.title: How Wenlan turns ongoing work into knowledge that stays current
svg.desc: Documents, notes, and AI conversations become traceable evidence and maintained pages. Wenlan handles routine organization and asks for judgment only on conflicts or changes to human writing. A daily brief, capture, handoff, and refinement loop returns current knowledge to every supported tool.
